---
title: "Séminaire des étudiants de la Chaire CARA"
subtitle: |
  | Beyond cost sensitive fraud detection with machine learning model
  | Raphael Zerbato, HEC Montréal 
date: 2023-02-22
toc: TRUE
---

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="65%"}

:::


::: {.column width="2%"}
<!-- empty column to create gap -->
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![](../../img/Plain.png)
:::

::: {.column width="3%"}
<!-- empty column to create gap -->
:::

::::
